title: amygdalus simonii
intro: Amygdalus simonii, also known as the Chinese apricot or apricot kernel tree, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China. The medicinal properties of Amygdalus simonii include its high concentration of amygdalin, a compound that has been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Amygdalus simonii include its potential to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The herbal preparations of Amygdalus simonii include kernel extracts, teas, and tinctures, which are often used to treat conditions such as cancer, fever, and digestive issues.
